headline: Dow Jones Hits High, Broadcom, Ciena Slam AI, Chip Stocks, SpaceX IPO Ahead: Weekly Review
summary: The Dow Jones hit a new high while the Nasdaq tumbled as Broadcom and Ciena triggered AI and chip losses. SpaceX set an IPO price target.

headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Is Up 40.5% After Boosting 2026 Outlook And Unveiling New AI Server
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise recently reported past second-quarter 2026 results showing US$9,774 million in sales versus US$6,771 million a year earlier, swinging from a US$1,050 million net loss to a US$624 million net profit and prompting higher full-year revenue and earnings guidance. At the same time, HPE advanced its AI and data center ambitions with the upcoming ProLiant Compute DL394 Gen12 server launch and continued large-scale share repurchases that have retired 51.89% of its stock...
